site.name: DualGrid
site.tagline: Websites that convert visitors into clients

hero.subtitle: We combine artistic design with precise engineering to create unique digital presences. Portfolios, restaurants, landing pages and custom systems.

why.title: The DualGrid difference
why.subtitle: We're not a large agency. We're a small team that treats every project as if it were our own.

items.title: 100% custom design
items.desc: No templates. Every site is unique and designed from scratch for your brand.

items.title: Full service
items.desc: You just approve. We handle everything: design, code, domain and hosting.

items.title: Direct communication
items.desc: Clear, barrier-free communication. WhatsApp support throughout the project.

items.title: We build what you need
items.desc: No feature limits. If you need it, we build it.

items.title: Perfect on all devices
items.desc: Responsive design from the first sketch. Works on mobile, tablet and desktop.

items.title: Clean and secure code
items.desc: We follow security and performance best practices on every project.

process.title: Clear process, predictable results
process.subtitle: We follow a proven workflow that guarantees quality and transparency at every stage.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: Initial meeting to understand your goals, style and target audience.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: We send a detailed proposal with scope, price and timeline.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: We create wireframes and mockups for your approval. 2 revision rounds.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: We code the site with clean, responsive and optimized code.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: We configure domain, hosting and publish. We hand over all credentials.

steps.title: Support
steps.desc: 30-day guarantee for technical bug fixes after launch.

plans.title: Solutions for every type of business
plans.subtitle: From landing pages to custom systems. Every plan includes unique design, clean code and post-launch support.
plans.custom_note: Can't find what you're looking for?
plans.custom_suffix: and we'll prepare a tailored proposal for you.

questionnaire.title: Project questionnaire
questionnaire.subtitle: Answer a few questions so we can recommend the best plan for you.
questionnaire.step1_subtitle: This information helps us personalize your proposal.
questionnaire.step2_subtitle: Select the one that best describes you.
questionnaire.step3_subtitle: What do you want to achieve with your website?
questionnaire.step4_subtitle: Help us tailor the proposal to your possibilities.
questionnaire.step5_subtitle: How do you want your site to look? (up to 3)
questionnaire.step6_subtitle: What material do you currently have?
questionnaire.result_subtitle: Based on your answers, this is the ideal plan for your business.
questionnaire.result_whatsapp_msg: Hi! I saw the recommendation on DualGrid and want more info about the plan

footer.tagline: Design with purpose, code with precision.

error.somethingWentWrongLoadThePage: Something went wrong while loading this page. Our team has been notified.

portfolio.title: Projects we've built
portfolio.subtitle: Real sites we've designed and developed for clients. Every project is custom, unique, and delivered on time.
